title: JOYIN 71 Pcs Cutting Play Food Toy Set for Kids Kitchen,Plastic Fruit & Vegetables with Storage Basket,Mini Dishes & Knife,Educational Pretend Play Toys,Toddler Gift
features: COMPREHENSIVE PLAY FOOD TOY SET:Includes 71 pcs play food toy (36 realistic fruits & vegetables) with storage basket, mini dishes & knife. Each piece slices apart and reconnects – perfect for toddler pretend play kitchens!
REALISTIC PLAY FOOD FUNCTIONS:Toy food pieces produce satisfying click sounds when cut! Develops fine motor skills and chef role-play. Easy for kids to cut repeatedly for educational kitchen fun.

ULTIMATE PLAY FOOD GIFT TOY:Boost creativity & cognitive skills through interactive food play! This cutting play food set develops children's thinking skills and imagination, perfect for home play kitchen pretend chef games, preschool learning activities (teaching colors/food groups), birthday party group toy food fun, and as a ready-to-gift Christmas surprise – sparking instant joy in any setting!
UK-SAFETY CERTIFIED TOY:Non-toxic play food meets UK standards (BPA-free). Safety-tested for worry-free toddler play.
JOYIN GIFT PROMISE:Love this play food gift set or contact us! 365-day guarantee on all educational toys.
